name: Command
description: One entry in a CommandPalette. `hint` is searched but never shown, so a command can be found by a synonym that never appears in its label.

id.description: A stable identity for the command, so a host can switch on it rather than on the label.

label.description: What the command is called, and the primary text searched.

hint.description: Searched but never shown — a synonym that finds the command.

icon.description: A Phosphor class name for the leading glyph Arena draws.

shortcut.description: The keystroke shown at the row's trailing edge, monospaced. Display only — the palette does not bind it.
